# CRISPR-Cas9 review notes

Doudna & Charpentier 2012 showed that a programmable guide RNA can direct
Cas9 to any genomic target with a PAM (NGG) adjacent. The sgRNA fusion of
crRNA and tracrRNA simplified the system dramatically.

Key papers to track:
- Jinek 2012 (Science)
- Cong 2013 (Science)
- Mali 2013 (Science)
- Ran 2013 (Nature Protocols)
